chinese_text: 式微式微，胡不歸？微君之故，胡為乎中露？
translation_text:
Reduced! Reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your sake, O prince,
How should we be thus exposed to the dew?

chinese_text: 式微式微，胡不歸？微君之躬，胡為乎泥中？
translation_text:
Reduced! reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your person, O prince,
How should we be here in the mire?
